page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool includes functions for reading aCGH data from image analysis output files and clone information files or creating S3 objects for storing these data. It also incudes basic methods for accessing/replacing, subsetting, printing and plotting aCGH objects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool includes functions for reading aCGH data from image analysis output files and clone information files or creating S3 objects for storing these data. It also incudes basic methods for accessing/replacing, subsetting, printing and plotting aCGH objects.
